data.title: CI-script-tests: harvest-worktree.sh uses relative ../hooks paths -> test-plugin-scripts-no-relative-paths.sh fails
data.description:
## Incident Overview
test-plugin-scripts-no-relative-paths.sh fails because harvest-worktree.sh (lines 149-158) uses SCRIPT_DIR/../hooks relative paths instead of _PLUGIN_ROOT-based paths. This was introduced by commit 40424258 (fix for f518-bba6) which added --attest script invocations using a HOOK_DIR derived from SCRIPT_DIR/../hooks.

Lines flagged:
- line 149: if [[ -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/../hooks/lib/deps.sh" ]]; then
- line 150: source "$SCRIPT_DIR/../hooks/lib/deps.sh"
- line 158: HOOK_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/../hooks"

## Expected Behavior
Plugin scripts should use _PLUGIN_ROOT for cross-directory references, not relative ../hooks paths.

## Actual Behavior
harvest-worktree.sh uses SCRIPT_DIR/../hooks which is fragile and violates the no-relative-paths convention.

## Fix
Replace SCRIPT_DIR/../hooks with _PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks (already set on line 1 of the file).

## Evidence
CI run 24319865314 (2026-04-13), Script Tests job.
